name: items_grid_v3
prompt:
A 3x3 grid, 9 square cells with clear black borders, cartoon style. Each cell contains ONE game item icon: 

Row 1: [gold coin] [dinosaur fossil] [blue dragon egg]
Row 2: [hammer] [flask] [bone]  
Row 3: [red spiky egg] [golden shield] [device]

Flat vector art, bright colors, white background, pixel game aesthetic.
